description: Zanzibar-specific canary guardrail thresholds. Extends base guardrails with authz metrics.

authz_check_p95_ms.description: AuthZ check (single + batch) p95 latency. SK-11 target.

authz_deny_rate_pct.description: Percentage of authz checks returning deny. High rate may indicate model regression.

authz_cache_miss_rate_pct.description: ScopeContext cache miss rate. >50% indicates cache warm-up issue or TTL too short.

authz_error_rate_pct.description: AuthZ endpoint 5xx error rate. >0.5% triggers rollback consideration.
